_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.6)**_



The plan has clear natural boundaries. Here's my proposed split:

---

### Proposed Structure: `workers/` folder

```
workers/
├── plan-overview.md          # TL;DR, Decisions, Architecture choices
├── plan-phases.md            # Implementation Phases 1-8 (sequencing & dependencies)
├── plan-html.md              # §1 — HTML Resume read/write operations
├── plan-linkedin.md          # §2 — LinkedIn read (+ MCP research note)
├── plan-orcid.md             # §3 — ORCID read/write + OAuth setup
├── plan-europass.md          # §4 — Europass read/write + XML schema
├── plan-json-internal.md     # §5 — Internal JSON files, diff, import, changelog format
├── plan-files.md             # Relevant Files (existing + to create), Python dependencies
├── plan-open-questions.md    # Further Considerations #1-#8
└── plan-verification.md      # Verification criteria + Next Steps After Approval
```

### Rationale

| Document | Source sections | Why separate |
|---|---|---|
| **overview** | TL;DR + Decisions + Excluded | Quick reference — answers "what are we building and why" without details |
| **phases** | Implementation Phases 1–8 | Standalone sequencing doc; references other docs by operation |
| **html / linkedin / orcid / europass** | §1–§4 each | One doc per external data source — each is independently actionable |
| **json-internal** | §5 (import, diff, apply, changelog) | Core tooling that all sources feed into; includes the changelog format spec |
| **files** | Relevant Files + dependencies | Single inventory of everything to create; useful as a checklist |
| **open-questions** | Further Considerations 1–8 | Research items to resolve before/during implementation — easy to tick off |
| **verification** | Verification + Next Steps | Acceptance criteria and sequencing of what to do after plan approval |

### Cross-references

Each doc would have a short header linking back to **plan-overview.md** and forward to related docs (e.g., `plan-orcid.md` links to `plan-phases.md#phase-6` and `plan-open-questions.md#3`).

### Alternative: fewer files

If 10 files feels heavy, the minimum viable split is **5 docs**:

```
workers/
├── plan-overview.md           # TL;DR + Decisions + Phases + Verification + Next Steps
├── plan-sources-html.md       # §1 HTML + §2 LinkedIn (both file-based)
├── plan-sources-api.md        # §3 ORCID + §4 Europass (both API/external)
├── plan-json-internal.md      # §5 Internal JSON + changelog format
└── plan-open-questions.md     # Further Considerations + Files inventory
```

Want me to go with the 10-file or 5-file variant (or tweak the grouping)?
